---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature, needs-triage
---

## User Story

As a [user/role], I want [feature], so that [benefit].

## Description

[Clear description of what you're trying to accomplish]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] [Specific, testable outcome 1]
- [ ] [Specific, testable outcome 2]
- [ ] [Specific, testable outcome 3]
- [ ] Tests pass (target 85%+ coverage)
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Technical Details

**Approach:**
[How you plan to implement this]

**Affected Modules:**
[Which parts of the code are affected]

## Dependencies

Depends on: [issue numbers if any]

## Resources

- Documentation: [links]
- Design: [links]
- Related issues: [issue numbers]

## Estimate

**Story Points:** [XS/S/M/L/XL]
**Time Estimate:** [hours]

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code written with tests
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved (2+ approvals)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Demo-ready
- [ ] Merged and deployed to staging

---

## How to Close This Issue

**When creating a PR to address this issue:**

```
In your PR description, add one of these:

Fixes #[issue-number]
Closes #[issue-number]
Resolves #[issue-number]
```

**Example PR description:**
```markdown
## What
Implement [feature name]

Fixes #123

## Changes
- Added module X
- Added tests
- Updated docs
```

**Result:** When your PR is merged, this issue will automatically close ✅

See [GITHUB-ISSUES-MANDATE.md](https://github.com/kushin77/lux-auto/blob/main/GITHUB-ISSUES-MANDATE.md#11-automated-pr--issue-closing-workflow) for details
